context: We are preparing the e-commerce engine for a Two-Mode Multi-Brand system (BRAND and AFFILIATE). We are moving away from the legacy PagesCMS to Keystatic, and we need to graduate the blog system to MDX to support dynamic components like AdSense placeholders. Do NOT touch any existing D2C logic in Snipcart or Razorpay.

tasks.title: Nuke Legacy PagesCMS
tasks.instruction: Physically delete the file `.pages.yml` from the root of the project. It is no longer needed.

tasks.title: Install & Configure MDX Integration
tasks.instruction: Run `npx astro add mdx --yes`. This will install `@astrojs/mdx` and update `astro.config.mjs` automatically. Ensure the integration is placed in the `integrations` array in `astro.config.mjs`.

tasks.title: Migrate Blog to MDX
tasks.instruction: Rename all `.md` files in `src/content/zelia-vance/blog/` to `.mdx`. Ensure the frontmatter and content remain intact.

tasks.title: Update Content Config for MDX
tasks.instruction: In `src/content/config.ts`, update the `blog` collection loader pattern from `**/*.md` to `**/*.{md,mdx}` to support the new file extension.

tasks.title: Verify Build Integrity
tasks.instruction: Run `npm run build` or `npx astro check`. The build must succeed. Verify that the blog collection is correctly indexed with the new MDX files.
